_comment: Optional, project-shape-dependent templates. Everything under templates/ NOT listed here is core and always installed. Each item is individually selectable at install time; core-only is the non-interactive default.

optional.label: Database migrations
optional.description: Safe expand-contract DB/data migrations. Choose if the project has a database.

optional.label: API contracts
optional.description: Versioning, backward compatibility, deprecation. Choose if the project exposes an API or public interface.

optional.label: Observability
optional.description: Structured logging, metrics, tracing. Choose for a running service (less relevant for a pure library/CLI).

optional.label: Resilience
optional.description: Timeouts, retries, idempotency, graceful degradation. Choose if the project crosses network/process boundaries.

optional.label: Accessibility (a11y)
optional.description: Semantic HTML, keyboard, contrast, ARIA, WCAG. Choose if the project has a user-facing UI.

optional.label: Internationalization (i18n)
optional.description: Externalized strings, locale-aware formatting, pluralization, RTL. Choose if the project serves more than one language/locale.

optional.label: Configuration & secrets
optional.description: Env-based config, startup validation, .env.example, secret rotation. Choose if the project has runtime configuration or secrets.

optional.label: Data privacy (PII)
optional.description: Minimization, retention/deletion, encryption, consent, no PII in logs. Choose if the project handles personal or sensitive data.

optional.label: Incident & hotfix
optional.description: Production incident response: mitigate-first, hotfix, postmortem, rollback. Choose for a deployed service.
